observation: I can see a Specter.AI website with a sign-up form. There are input fields for email and password visible, along with a 'Next' button. The previous password input failed, so I need to try inputting the password again into the password field (element 7).
reasoning: As a normal user, I need to complete the sign-up form. The email was successfully entered, but the password input failed in the previous step. I should retry entering the password in the password field to proceed with registration.
ux_issues: Previous password input failed - may indicate input field issues

issues: Previous password input failed - may indicate input field issues

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The sign-up form elements (dashed outline boxes and numbered indicators 10, 8) completely disappeared from the interface. The page now shows only the header with Specter.AI logo and Sign Up button, with the rest being empty space.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: Password input action caused the entire sign-up form to be removed from the DOM or hidden, preventing user from completing the sign-up flow
